name: PixiJS
description: The fastest 2D WebGL rendering engine — batched sprites, displacement/distortion shaders, RGB split, bloom, glow and 30+ post-processing filters via pixi-filters. Industry standard for interactive visual effects.
head: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/pixi.js@7/dist/pixi.min.js"></script>
body:
<script>
(function() {
  if (typeof PIXI === 'undefined') return;
  var container = document.querySelector('.pixi-canvas-container');
  if (!container) return;

  var app = new PIXI.Application({
    width: container.offsetWidth,
    height: container.offsetHeight,
    backgroundAlpha: 0,
    resolution: window.devicePixelRatio || 1,
    autoDensity: true
  });
  container.appendChild(app.view);
  app.view.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;';

  // Example: displacement map distortion on hero image
  // Load your hero image as a PIXI.Sprite, then apply a DisplacementFilter
  // See: https://pixijs.com/examples for full examples

  // Basic animated gradient noise background
  var graphics = new PIXI.Graphics();
  app.stage.addChild(graphics);
  var time = 0;
  app.ticker.add(function() {
    time += 0.01;
    graphics.clear();
    for (var i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
      graphics.beginFill(i % 2 === 0 ? 0x5b4dff : 0x2dd4bf, 0.04);
      graphics.drawCircle(
        container.offsetWidth * 0.5 + Math.sin(time + i) * container.offsetWidth * 0.3,
        container.offsetHeight * 0.5 + Math.cos(time * 0.7 + i) * container.offsetHeight * 0.3,
        100 + i * 40
      );
      graphics.endFill();
    }
  });
})();
</script>
